title: Minimal Clay 3D Render Template

imagePrompts.prompt: A minimalist 3D render of a ceramic fox mascot, featuring a soft, smooth clay-like texture, centered and subtly floating. Set against a solid pastel deep teal background. Illuminated with soft, diffused studio lighting to enhance clean lines and simple forms. The composition emphasizes a modern, uncluttered aesthetic with a cheerful, approachable tone. High resolution, square format (1:1 aspect ratio)

Illuminated with soft, diffused studio lighting to enhance clean lines and simple forms. The composition emphasizes a modern, uncluttered aesthetic with a cheerful, approachable tone. High resolution, square format (1:1 aspect ratio)

prompt: A minimalist 3D render of a ceramic fox mascot, featuring a soft, smooth clay-like texture, centered and subtly floating. Set against a solid pastel deep teal background. Illuminated with soft, diffused studio lighting to enhance clean lines and simple forms. The composition emphasizes a modern, uncluttered aesthetic with a cheerful, approachable tone. High resolution, square format (1:1 aspect ratio)
originalPrompt: A minimalist 3D render of a ceramic fox mascot, featuring a soft, smooth clay-like texture, centered and subtly floating. Set against a solid pastel deep teal background. Illuminated with soft, diffused studio lighting to enhance clean lines and simple forms. The composition emphasizes a modern, uncluttered aesthetic with a cheerful, approachable tone. High resolution, square format (1:1 aspect ratio)

promptTranslations.zh: 一款极简风格3D渲染的ceramic fox mascot，采用柔和光滑的粘土质感纹理，居中微微悬浮。背景为纯色柔和的deep teal色调。使用柔和漫射的工作室灯光，突出简洁线条和简约造型。构图强调现代、干净的美学，氛围愉快亲切。高分辨率，方形格式（1:1 宽高比）。
promptTranslations.fr: Un rendu 3D minimaliste de ceramic fox mascot, présentant une texture douce et lisse semblable à de l'argile, centré et flottant subtilement. Sur un fond uni pastel deep teal. Éclairé par une lumière de studio douce et diffusée pour mettre en valeur des lignes nettes et des formes simples. La composition met l'accent sur une esthétique moderne et épurée avec un ton joyeux et accessible. Haute résolution, format carré (ratio 1:1).
promptTranslations.ru: Минималистичный 3D рендер ceramic fox mascot с мягкой, гладкой текстурой, похожей на глину, расположенный по центру и слегка парящий. На фоне однотонного пастельного deep teal. Освещён мягким рассеянным студийным светом для подчеркивания чистых линий и простых форм. Композиция акцентирует современную, минималистичную эстетику с дружелюбной, тёплой атмосферой. Высокое разрешение, квадратный формат (1:1 соотношение).
promptTranslations.pt: Uma renderização 3D minimalista de um ceramic fox mascot, com textura suave e macia semelhante a argila, centrada e flutuando sutilmente. Contra um fundo sólido pastel deep teal. Iluminada com iluminação de estúdio suave e difusa para realçar linhas limpas e formas simples. A composição enfatiza uma estética moderna e descomplicada com um tom alegre e acessível. Alta resolução, formato quadrado (proporção 1:1).
promptTranslations.ja: ceramic fox mascot のミニマルな 3D レンダリング。柔らかく滑らかな粘土のようなテクスチャが特徴で、中央に微妙に浮いています。無地のパステル deep teal 背景に設定します。柔らかく拡散したスタジオ照明で照らされ、きれいなラインとシンプルなフォルムが強調されます。この構成は、明るく親しみやすいトーンで、モダンで整然とした美学を強調しています。高解像度、正方形フォーマット (アスペクト比 1:1)
promptTranslations.ko: 부드럽고 매끄러운 점토 같은 질감이 중앙에 있고 미묘하게 떠 있는 ceramic fox mascot의 미니멀한 3D 렌더링입니다. 단색 파스텔 deep teal 배경에 설정합니다. 부드러운 확산 스튜디오 조명으로 깔끔한 라인과 심플한 형태를 강조합니다. 이 구성은 명랑하고 친근한 톤으로 현대적이고 깔끔한 미학을 강조합니다. 고해상도, 정사각형 형식(가로세로 비율 1:1)
